wins: Record third quarter revenue across all businesses
Positive operating leverage for the firm and each of its 5 businesses
Strong growth in cross-border transactions and U.S. dollar clearing
New partnership with BlackRock for managing $80 billion in assets
Successful integration of Citi Token Services with 24/7 clearing platform
risks: Potential for higher severance costs than originally expected
Uncertainty around regulatory approvals for Banamex divestiture
Market volatility and potential for credit losses
Challenges in achieving efficiency ratio below 60%
Dependence on continued revenue growth and FX translation
